incidents.title: Developing: Project head arrested, safety officer booked in Pune building collapse case
incidents.summary: Project head arrested, safety officer booked in Pune building collapse case
incidents.impact: The area may remain hazardous while rescue, recovery or safety checks continue.
incidents.recommendedAction: Avoid the immediate area and follow police, fire-service or civic instructions.

incidents.title: Developing: Daund woman’s organ donation gives new lease of life to four patients
incidents.summary: The woman, an insurance agent, was admitted to Noble Hospitals and Research Centre (NHRC) on July 7 with severe injuries sustained in the accident. She was declared brain dead on July 9, following which her family consented to organ donation.
incidents.impact: Traffic delays are likely near the incident location.
incidents.recommendedAction: Avoid the affected stretch if possible.

incidents.title: Developing: 3 women warkaris killed, 7 injured in palkhi truck hit
incidents.summary: Police said that the truck belonged to the dindi of Ranganath Maharaj Pokharbisikar from Loha in Nanded district and was among the authorised vehicles accompanying the procession. It struck a group of women devotees from a dindi belonging to Kasabe Digraj in Sangli district.
incidents.impact: Traffic delays are likely near the incident location.
incidents.recommendedAction: Avoid the affected stretch if possible.

incidents.title: Developing: Pune building collapse: FIR registered against two officials of energy company for safety lapses, negligence
incidents.summary: A current trusted-media report relevant to Pune District.
